name: 反三角函数
subject: math
curriculum_points: HSF-TF.B.6 Understand that restricting a trigonometric function to a domain on which it is always increasing or always decreasing allows its inverse to be constructed.
HSF-TF.B.7 Use inverse functions to solve trigonometric equations that arise in modeling contexts; evaluate the solutions using technology, and interpret them in terms of the context.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「反三角函数」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：HSF-TF.B.6 Understand that restricting a trigonometric function to a domain on which it is always increasing or always d…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：HSF-TF.B.7 Use inverse functions to solve trigonometric equations that arise in … 对理解「反三角函数」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
